sections.paragraph:
Original: שׁפוּפן שׁפוּפם

Transliteration: shephûphâm shephûphân

Phonetic: shef-oo-fawm'

BDB Definition:

Shephuphan or Shupham = "serpent"
  1. son of Bela and grandson of Benjamin

Origin: from the same as H8207

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
